modelIdentification.name: SISO-STD-002 - Link 16 Simulation FOM module
modelIdentification.purpose: Defines the Link 16 model in an HLA federation
modelIdentification.description: This module integrates the interaction classes of the SISO-STD-002 Standard for Link 16 Simulation into the RPR FOM 2.0. Note that the Enumerations module and the Communication module also have been updated.
modelIdentification.useHistory: Updated for integration with the RPR FOM 2.0.

poc.pocName: TADIL TALES Product Development Group and Product Support Group

reference.identification: SISO-STD-002-2021 Standard for Link 16 Simulation Version 2.0 8 November 2021
SISO-STD-001-2015 Standard for Guidance, Rationale, and Interoperability Modalities for the Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model Version 2.0 10 August 2015
SISO-STD-001.1-2015 Standard for Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model Version 2.0 10 August 2015
SISO-REF-010-2020 Reference for Enumerations for Simulation Interoperability Version 29 19 May 2021
Real-time Platform Reference Communication FOM Module

modelIdentification.other:

interactionClass.name: TDLBinaryRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Parent class for all TDL radio signals.

interactionClass.name: Link16RadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal common base class.

parameter.name: NPGNumber
parameter.semantics: Network/Needline Participation Group (NPG) number. Not optional.

parameter.name: NetNumber
parameter.semantics: Network Number. Not optional.

parameter.name: TSEC_CVLL
parameter.semantics: Transmission Security Crypto Variable Logic Label. Optional for TSA Levels 0-2; default value: all bits set to one (no statement/wildcard).

parameter.name: MSEC_CVLL
parameter.semantics: Message Security Crypto Variable Logic Label. Optional for TSA Levels 0-2; default value: all bits set to one (no statement/wildcard).

parameter.name: SISOSTD002Version
parameter.semantics: Indicates which SISO-STD-002 version was used, i.e., whether byte swapping has or has not been used in the Message Data field (0 = SISO-STD-002-2006, legacy byte swapping employed; 1 = SISO-STD-002-2021, new method, bit stream, no byte swapping employed). Not optional.

parameter.name: Link16Version
parameter.semantics: Indicates which version of MIL-STD-6016 or STANAG 5516 is being used. Optional; default value: NoStatement.

parameter.name: TimeSlotID
parameter.semantics: Time slot identification. Optional for low-fidelity TSA Levels (0, 1); default value: all bits set to one (no statement/wildcard).

parameter.name: PerceivedTransmitTime
parameter.semantics: The time at which the radio signal is transmitted. Optional for low-fidelity synchronization (TSA Levels 0-3); default value: all bits set to one (no statement/wildcard).

interactionClass.name: JTIDSMessageRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal containing Fixed Word Format (FWF) TADIL-J messages.

parameter.name: JTIDSHeader
parameter.semantics: Link 16 Header Word. Not optional.

parameter.name: TADILJMessage
parameter.semantics: Link 16 message data words. Not optional.

interactionClass.name: RTTABRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal containing an RTT/A or RTT/B message.

parameter.name: RTTAB
parameter.semantics: JTIDS RTT A/B message word. Not optional.

interactionClass.name: RTTReplyRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal containing an RTT Reply message.

parameter.name: RTTReply
parameter.semantics: JTIDS RTT reply message word. Not optional.

interactionClass.name: JTIDSVoiceCVSDRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal containing a voice message encoded using CVSD.

parameter.name: DataLength
parameter.semantics: The length of the encoded voice in the Data parameter, in bits. Not optional.

parameter.name: JTIDSHeader
parameter.semantics: Link 16 Header Word. Not optional.

parameter.name: Data
parameter.semantics: JTIDS CVSD encoded voice data. Not optional.

interactionClass.name: JTIDSVoiceLPC10RadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal containing a voice message encoded using LPC10.

parameter.name: DataLength
parameter.semantics: The length of the encoded voice in the Data parameter, in bits. Not optional.

parameter.name: JTIDSHeader
parameter.semantics: Link 16 Header Word. Not optional.

parameter.name: Data
parameter.semantics: JTIDS LPC10 encoded voice data. Not optional.

interactionClass.name: JTIDSVoiceLPC12RadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal containing a voice message encoded using LPC12.

parameter.name: DataLength
parameter.semantics: The length of the encoded voice in the Data parameter, in bits. Not optional.

parameter.name: JTIDSHeader
parameter.semantics: Link 16 Header Word. Not optional.

parameter.name: Data
parameter.semantics: JTIDS LPC12 encoded voice data. Not optional.

interactionClass.name: JTIDSLETRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal containing Link 16 Enhanced Throughput (LET) encoded messages.

parameter.name: LETHeader
parameter.semantics: LET Header Word. Not optional.

parameter.name: TADILJMessage
parameter.semantics: LET message data words. Not optional.

interactionClass.name: VMFRadioSignal
interactionClass.semantics: Link 16 radio signal containing Variable Message Format (VMF) messages.

parameter.name: JTIDSHeader
parameter.semantics: Link 16 Header Word. Not optional.

parameter.name: MessageData
parameter.semantics: Link 16 message data words with VMF information fields. Not optional.

simpleData.name: CryptoVariable
simpleData.semantics: An integer identification of the crypto variable used for JTIDS transmission and message encryption. This variable allows for simulated crypto netting. Valid range: [0,127] and all bits set to one indicating no statement/wildcard.

simpleData.name: NetworkNumber
simpleData.semantics: Used to create virtual sub-circuits within NPG for stacked nets or between NPGs for multi-net operations. Valid range: [0,127].

simpleData.name: NetworkParticipationGroupNumber
simpleData.semantics: Used to segregate information within a JTIDS/MIDS network. Creates virtual networks of participants. Valid range: [0,511].

simpleData.name: TimeSlotIdentifier
simpleData.semantics: Bits 0-16 indicate the Time Slot Number; valid arrange [0,98303]. Time Slot 0 represents time slot A-1, and Time Slot 98303 represents C-32767. When the Epoch is 112, the last valid time slot is 45151 (end of the day). Bits 17-23 are padding and set to 0. Bits 24-31 indicate the Epoch number; valid range [0,112]. An epoch is 12.8 minutes long, 112.5 epochs in a 24 hour day. All bits set to one (including the padding field) indicate a no statement/wildcard.

arrayData.name: TADILJWordStructLengthlessArray1Plus
arrayData.semantics: Array of at least 1 TADILJWordStruct, encoded without the number of array elements.

arrayData.name: OctetLengthlessArray29Plus
arrayData.semantics: Array of at least 29 octets, encoded without the number of array elements.

fixedRecordData.name: JTIDSHeaderStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Link 16 Header Word (35 bits) for common messages, JTIDS voice, and VMF. Padded to 48 bits.

field.name: Data
field.semantics: In total 48 bits, with the following fields: Bits 0-2: Time Slot Type. Bit 3: Relay Transmission Indicator. Bits 4-18: Source Track Number of Sender. Bits 19-34: Secure Data Unit Serial Number. Bits 35-47: Padding, set to 0.

fixedRecordData.name: LETHeaderStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Link 16 Enhanced Throughput (LET) Header Word (40 bits). Padded to 48 bits.

field.name: Data
field.semantics: In total 48 bits, with the following fields: Bits 0-3: LET ID Symbol. Bit 4: Relay Transmission Indicator. Bits 5-8: LET Message Packing Type. Bits 9-23: Source Track Number of Sender. Bits 24-39: Secure Data Unit Serial Number. Bits 40-47: Padding, set to 0.

fixedRecordData.name: NTPTimestampStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: 64-bit timestamp format according to RFC 5905. All bits set to one in both fields indicate a no statement/wildcard.

field.name: Seconds
field.semantics: Number of seconds since 0 h 1 January 1900 UTC.

field.name: Fraction
field.semantics: Fraction of a second, in 1/(2^32) resolution (232 picoseconds).

fixedRecordData.name: RTTABStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: JTIDS RTT A/B word (35 bits). Padded to 48 bits.

field.name: Data
field.semantics: In total 48 bits, with the following fields: Bits 0-2: Time Slot Type. Bit 3: RTT Interrogation Type. Bits 4-18: variable content, see MIL-STD-6016 or STANAG 5516. Bits 19-34: Secure Data Unit Serial Number. Bits 35-47: Padding, set to 0.

fixedRecordData.name: RTTReplyStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: JTIDS RTT Reply word (35 bits). Padded to 48 bits.

field.name: Data
field.semantics: In total 48 bits, with the following fields: Bits 0-18: Time of Arrival. Bits 19-34: Secure Data Unit Serial Number. Bits 35-47: Padding, set to 0.

fixedRecordData.name: TADILJWordStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: TADIL-J word (75 bits) used for Fixed Word Format (FWF) messages and the Variable Message Format (VMF). Padded to 80 bits.

field.name: Data
field.semantics: In total 80 bits, with the following fields: Bits 0-1: Word Format. Bits 2-69: variable content, see MIL-STD-6016 or STANAG 5516 for FWF J-Words. Bits 70-74: Parity. Bits 75-79: Padding, set to 0.
